original_request: Can you make me a decorative abstract sculpture of my feelings?

arguments.intent: a decorative abstract sculpture of my feelings

notes: A request that maps to no validated workflow. The discovery layer must decline safely: no_confident_match with an empty candidate list and a families fallback, NOT a confident wrong pick. Modeled with the 'declined' disposition (see plans/goals.md G2); declining safely is a success of the safety design, not an error envelope, so there is no structured error here.
